title: ai_extract and ai_classify are now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
The [`ai_extract`](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_extract) and [`ai_classify`](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_classify) SQL AI functions are now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled and **HIPAA**, **PCI-DSS**, **FedRAMP Moderate**, **CCCS Medium (Protected B)**, **UK Cyber Essentials Plus**, **HITRUST**, **IRAP**, **C5**, and **TISAX** controls selected.

Use `ai_extract` to extract structured fields from unstructured text against a user-defined schema. Use `ai_classify` to classify text into user-defined labels for routing, tagging, and document categorization workflows. You can also use Agent Bricks to create an [information extraction agent](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/info-extraction) and a [classification agent](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/classification).
